general.title: General settings
general.desc: Configure general settings for the intelligence assistant plugin.

pluginVersion.name: Plugin version
pluginVersion.desc: Current version of the intelligence assistant plugin

defaultModel.name: Default model
defaultModel.desc: Default model to use for conversations

defaultChatMode.name: Default chat mode
defaultChatMode.desc: Choose which mode the chat view opens with

conversationIcons.name: Conversation icons
conversationIcons.desc: Enable automatic icon generation for conversations

configStatus.name: Configuration status
configStatus.incomplete: ⚠️ Incomplete - Please configure providers and models

llm.title: LLM configuration
llm.desc: Configure language model providers and manage available models.

models.title: Model configuration
models.desc: View and manage models from all configured providers. Click "refresh models" to fetch the latest available models.
models.empty: No providers configured yet. Add providers in the provider tab first.
models.noModels: No models available. Click "refresh all models" or refresh individual providers in the provider tab.
models.noMatch: No models match the current filters. Adjust or clear filters to see results.

provider.title: Provider configuration
provider.securityDesc: API keys are stored as plain text in your vault for compatibility. To prevent accidental leaks:
provider.securityItem2: Add this folder to your .gitignore if you use Git sync.
provider.securityItem3: Be cautious when using public cloud sync services.
provider.desc: Manage LLM providers and API credentials. Use the actions column to edit configuration details or refresh cached models.
provider.empty: No providers configured. Select "Add provider" to get started.

mcp.title: MCP server management
mcp.desc: Configure Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers to extend agent capabilities with external tools and data sources.
mcp.empty: No MCP servers configured. Select Add MCP server to get started.

notices.testNoCommand: ❌ please enter a command before testing connection

agents.title: Agent management
agents.desc: Create and manage AI agents with specific capabilities, tools, and behaviors.
agents.empty: No agents configured. Select add agent to get started.

model.useChatViewDesc: Will use model selected in chat view
model.useDefaultDesc: Will use default model from settings

prompts.title: System prompts
prompts.desc: Manage system prompts that define the behavior and personality of your AI assistant.
prompts.empty: No system prompts configured. Select add system prompt to get started.

tools.title: Tool configuration
tools.desc: Review built-in tools and explore MCP tools loaded from connected servers. Enable the actions your agents should be able to perform.

readFile.desc: Read the contents of a file from your vault
readFile.params: path (required): Path to the file to read

writeFile.desc: Prepare a proposal to write or update a file in your vault
writeFile.params: path (required), content (required): File path and proposed content

listFiles.desc: List files in the vault or a specific folder
listFiles.params: folder (optional), extension (optional): Filter by folder and file extension

searchFiles.desc: Search for files by name or content in your vault
searchFiles.params: query (required), search_content (optional), limit (optional): Search query and options

createNote.desc: Prepare a proposal to create a new note
createNote.params: title (required), content (required), folder (optional): Note title, proposed content, and location

appendNote.desc: Prepare a proposal to append content to an existing note
appendNote.params: path (required), content (required): Note path and proposed content to append

builtIn.infoText: Built-in tools are configured per plugin settings. MCP tools are managed independently—use the MCP tab to connect servers and refresh tool availability.

mcpTools.noTools: No MCP tools available. Connect a server or refresh cached tools to populate this list.

openapi.desc: Generate HTTP tools from OpenAPI documents. Remote specs are cached under {{cacheDir}}.

notices.reloadFailed: Failed to reload HTTP source. Check the console for details.

displayName.name: Display name
displayName.desc: Shown to agents when choosing a tool source

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.desc: Enable to expose this HTTP API to every agent

specUrl.name: OpenAPI URL
specUrl.desc: Fetched and cached inside the plugin data directory

specPath.name: OpenAPI file path
specPath.desc: Relative path inside the vault or an absolute path

baseUrl.name: Base URL override
baseUrl.desc: Override the first server entry from the document (optional)

auth.name: Authentication
auth.desc: Automatically insert API keys when calling this source

cli.desc: Define local command-line tools that agents can execute. Use templates like {{param}} for dynamic arguments.
cli.infoText: CLI tools execute shell commands locally. Use {{paramName}} in arguments for template substitution, or configure parameters to be passed as arguments or environment variables.

toolName.name: Tool name
toolName.desc: Identifier used by agents to call this tool

description.name: Description
description.desc: Describe what this tool does for the AI

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.desc: Enable to allow agents to use this tool

command.name: Command
command.desc: The executable to run (e.g., node, python, bash, /path/to/script)

args.name: Arguments
args.desc: Command arguments, one per line. Use {{paramName}} for template substitution.

cwd.name: Working directory
cwd.desc: Directory to run the command in (optional)

shell.name: Run in shell
shell.desc: Execute the command through a shell (enables shell features like pipes)

modal.paramsDesc: Define parameters that the AI can pass to this tool.

insertAs.name: Insert as
insertAs.desc: How to pass this parameter to the command

envName.name: Env variable name
envName.desc: Override the environment variable name (defaults to uppercase parameter name)

modal.envDesc: Static environment variables to set when running the command.

presets.title: Add CLI tool from presets
presets.desc: Select a preset to quickly add a pre-configured CLI tool. You can customize it after adding.

notices.added: Added "{{name}}" - enable it in the CLI tools list

rag.title: RAG configuration
rag.desc: Configure retrieval-augmented generation and web search to enhance AI responses.

enableRag.name: Enable RAG
enableRag.desc: Enable Retrieval-Augmented Generation for enhanced context

embeddingModel.name: Embedding model
embeddingModel.desc: Model to use for generating embeddings

embedChanged.name: Embed changed files automatically
embedChanged.desc: Automatically re-embed files when they are modified

indexMgmt.title: Index management
indexMgmt.desc: Manage your RAG index and view statistics about indexed content.
indexMgmt.empty: Index is empty. Select rebuild index to start indexing.

rebuild.name: Rebuild index
rebuild.desc: Re-index all files in your vault. This may take a while.

refresh.name: Refresh index
refresh.desc: Update the index with any changed files since last indexing.

clear.name: Clear index
clear.desc: Remove all indexed data. You will need to rebuild the index.

strategy.name: Chunking strategy
strategy.desc: Strategy for splitting documents into chunks

chunkSize.name: Chunk size
chunkSize.desc: Number of characters per chunk (500-2000 recommended)

chunkOverlap.name: Chunk overlap
chunkOverlap.desc: Number of overlapping characters between chunks

searchType.name: Search type
searchType.desc: Type of similarity search to perform

topK.name: Top K results
topK.desc: Number of most relevant chunks to retrieve (1-20)

threshold.name: Similarity threshold
threshold.desc: Minimum similarity score to include results (0.0-1.0)

includeTypes.name: Include file types
includeTypes.desc: File types to include (empty = all types)

excludeTypes.name: Exclude file types
excludeTypes.desc: File types to exclude from indexing

filterByTag.name: Filter by tag
filterByTag.desc: Only index files with these tags (empty = all files)

excludeByTag.name: Exclude by tag
excludeByTag.desc: Exclude files with these tags from indexing

batchSize.name: Embedding batch size
batchSize.desc: Number of chunks to embed in parallel

grading.title: Grading settings
grading.desc: Grade retrieved chunks for relevance before sending to the LLM. This helps filter out low-quality results.

graderSource.name: Grader model source
graderSource.desc: Where to get the grader model from

graderModel.name: Grader model
graderModel.desc: Specific model to use for grading

parallel.name: Parallel processing
parallel.desc: Number of chunks to grade in parallel

websearch.title: Web search configuration
websearch.desc: Configure web search functionality to enhance AI responses with up-to-date information from the internet.

enabled.name: Enable web search
enabled.desc: Allow AI to search the web for current information

autoTrigger.name: Auto-trigger search
autoTrigger.desc: Automatically trigger web search when the query requires current information (e.g., news, prices, recent events)

maxResults.name: Maximum results
maxResults.desc: Maximum number of search results to return

timeRange.name: Result freshness
timeRange.desc: Limit results to a time range supported by providers (Google, SearXNG, Mojeek)

provider.name: Search provider
provider.desc: Choose from privacy-friendly scrapers or API-backed engines

searchLanguage.name: Language code
searchLanguage.desc: ISO language code (e.g., en, fr, zh-CN) forwarded to providers that support localization

searchCountry.name: Country/market code
searchCountry.desc: Two-letter country code (e.g., US, DE) used by Bing, DuckDuckGo, Brave, and others

includeDomains.name: Include only these domains
includeDomains.desc: Comma-separated list used by SerpAPI and Brave to limit results to specific sites

excludeDomains.name: Exclude domains
excludeDomains.desc: Comma-separated domains to filter out after fetching results

apiKey.name: Default API key
apiKey.desc: Shared API key used by Google, Bing, SerpAPI, Tavily, or Brave when provider-specific keys are not set

googleCseId.name: Google Custom Search Engine ID
googleCseId.desc: Required with a Google API key when using the Google provider

serpapiEndpoint.name: SerpAPI endpoint
serpapiEndpoint.desc: Override the SerpAPI base URL if you are self-hosting

tavilyApiKey.name: Tavily API key
tavilyApiKey.desc: Overrides the default key when using the Tavily provider

searxngEndpoint.name: SearXNG endpoint
searxngEndpoint.desc: Base URL of your SearXNG instance (must return JSON)

braveApiKey.name: Brave API key
braveApiKey.desc: Use a Brave Search API subscription token when selected as the provider

qwantApiKey.name: Qwant API key (optional)
qwantApiKey.desc: Add a bearer token if your Qwant plan issues one

quickActions.title: Quick actions
quickActions.desc: Configure AI-powered quick actions that appear in the editor context menu when text is selected.

actionPrefix.name: Action prefix
actionPrefix.desc: Prefix (emoji or text) to display before all quick actions in the context menu

quickActions.empty: No quick actions configured. Select add quick action to get started.

usageInfo.title: Usage
usageInfo.step3: Choose a quick action from the menu
usageInfo.step4Replace: Actions marked as "replace" will replace the selected text with the AI result
usageInfo.step4Explain: Actions marked as "explain" will show the result in a modal dialog

name.name: Name
name.desc: Display name for this action in the context menu

actionType.name: Action type
actionType.desc: How the AI response should be handled

model.name: Model
model.desc: Language model to use for this action (leave blank to use default)

promptTemplate.name: Prompt template
promptTemplate.desc: Instructions sent to the AI. The selected text will be appended automatically.

make-longer.name: Make text longer
make-longer.prompt: Expand and elaborate on the following text, making it more detailed and comprehensive while maintaining the original meaning and tone. Only return the expanded text without any additional commentary:

summarize.name: Summarize text
summarize.prompt: Provide a concise summary of the following text. Only return the summary without any additional commentary:

improve-writing.name: Improve writing
improve-writing.prompt: Improve the writing quality, clarity, and style of the following text. Only return the improved text without any additional commentary:

fix-grammar.name: Fix grammar
fix-grammar.prompt: Fix any grammar, spelling, and punctuation errors in the following text. Only return the corrected text without any additional commentary:

explain.name: Explain text
explain.prompt: Explain the following text in simple terms:

usage.title: Token usage
usage.desc: Track token consumption across providers and models. Data is accumulated across all conversations.
usage.notAvailable: Token usage tracking is not available.

confirm.clear: Clear all token usage records? This cannot be undone.

chat.placeholder: Type your message... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
chat.emptySubtext: Type a message below to get started, or select a conversation from history.

notices.waitForResponse: Please wait for the current response to finish
notices.configureProvider: Please configure an LLM provider in settings first
notices.noValidProvider: No valid provider configuration found for this model
notices.regenerateOnlyLatest: Only the most recent response can be regenerated right now
notices.regenerateNoUserMsg: Cannot find user message to regenerate from
notices.noAgents: No agents available. Configure agents in Settings → Agents.
notices.ragDisabled: RAG is disabled in settings. Enable it under settings → chat features → RAG.
notices.webSearchDisabled: Web search is disabled in settings. Enable it under settings → chat features → web search.
notices.waitForComplete: Please wait for the current response to complete
notices.chatServiceFallback: ChatService not configured. Using ChatView fallback.

ragStats.title: RAG statistics
ragStats.noFilesYet: ⚠️ no files have been indexed yet.

ragTooltip.goToSettings: Go to Settings → RAG to build the index.
ragTooltip.ragOff: ℹ️ RAG is currently turned off for this chat.

chat.addPictureTooltip: Attach an image to your message
chat.imageUnavailable: Image attachment is unavailable for the current model.

reference.title: Add references
reference.noResults: No matching files or folders found.

agentTask.title: Start agent task
agentTask.newConversationDesc: Keep this agent run separate from the current chat.

icon.name: Icon
icon.desc: Emoji or character to represent this agent

modelStrategy.name: Model strategy
modelStrategy.desc: Choose how the agent will select its model

promptName.name: Prompt name
promptName.desc: Display name for the new system prompt

promptContent.name: Prompt content
promptContent.desc: Content for the new system prompt

systemPrompt.name: System prompt
systemPrompt.desc: Choose from existing prompts or define a new one for this agent.

memory.title: Memory
memory.notice: Agent memory is temporarily unavailable while we iterate on the experience.

builtIn.name: Built-in tools
builtIn.desc: Select which built-in tools this agent can use

cli.name: CLI tools
cli.desc: Grant access to all enabled CLI tools, or pick individually below
cli.noTools: No CLI tools configured. Add and enable tools under Settings → Tools → CLI to use them here.

mcp.title: MCP access
mcp.noServers: No MCP servers configured. Add servers under Settings → MCP to unlock these options.
mcp.noToolsCached: No tools cached yet. Enable full access or refresh the cache.
mcp.noToolsAvailable: No tools available from this server yet.

notices.promptRequired: Please provide a name and content for the new system prompt.

fixedModel.name: Fixed model
fixedModel.desc: Select a specific model for this agent.
fixedModel.descNoModels: No cached models available. Refresh models in the Models tab.

maxTokens.label: Max tokens
maxTokens.desc: Maximum number of tokens to generate

contextWindow.label: Context window
contextWindow.desc: Number of previous messages to include in context

maxSteps.name: Max Tool Steps
maxSteps.desc: Maximum number of tool-call steps per agent turn

provider.title: Provider settings

modelFilter.name: Model filter
modelFilter.desc: Optional regex pattern to limit available models

resourceGroup.name: Resource group
resourceGroup.desc: Optional SAP AI Core resource group

serviceKey.name: Service key
serviceKey.desc: SAP AI Core service key (JSON string)

manageModels.name: Manage Models
manageModels.desc: Pull new models or update existing ones from the Ollama registry.

apiKey.name: API Key
apiKey.desc: Authentication key for the selected provider

provider.connectionFailed: Connection test failed. Check provider settings.

validation.apiKeyTooLong: API key is too long. Maximum length is 500 characters.
validation.invalidUrl: Invalid base URL format. Please enter a valid URL (e.g., https://api.example.com)

mcpInspector.title: MCP inspector
mcpInspector.desc: Inspect and debug Model Context Protocol (MCP) server connections and tools.

notices.enableFirst: Enable the server in settings before connecting

tools.title: Available MCP tools
tools.noTools: No MCP tools available. Check server connections.

logs.title: MCP connection logs
logs.placeholder: MCP connection logs will appear here. Currently showing placeholder information.

serverName.name: Server name
serverName.desc: Friendly name shown throughout the plugin

connectionMode.name: Connection mode
connectionMode.desc: Choose whether to connect automatically or only when triggered manually

command.name: Command
command.desc: Executable or script that starts the MCP server

envVars.name: Environment variables
envVars.desc: Optional KEY=VALUE pairs, one per line

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.desc: Disable to keep the server configured without connecting automatically

ollamaManager.title: Manage Ollama models
ollamaManager.pullHint: Enter a model name to download from Ollama library (e.g., llama2, mistral, codellama)
ollamaManager.noModels: No models found. Pull a model to get started.

confirmDelete.title: Confirm deletion
confirmDelete.message: Are you sure you want to delete the model "{{name}}"?

notices.pulling: Pulling {{name}}... This may take a while.

notices.noProvider: Please configure an LLM provider in settings first
notices.noModel: Please select a default model in settings
notices.noValidProvider: No valid provider configuration found for model: {{modelId}}

commands.openChatMain: Open AI chat in main area
commands.askAgentCurrentNote: Agent task: ask about current note
commands.findDuplicateNotes: Agent task: find duplicate and merge candidates
commands.doctorLinksTags: Agent task: improve links, tags, and properties
commands.draftFromNote: Agent task: draft from current note

contextMenu.askAgent: Intelligence assistant: ask agent about this file
contextMenu.createProjectBrief: Intelligence assistant: create project brief with agent
contextMenu.createResearchBrief: Intelligence assistant: create research brief with agent
contextMenu.findRelatedNotes: Intelligence assistant: find related notes with agent
contextMenu.doctorLinksTags: Intelligence assistant: improve links, tags, and properties with agent
contextMenu.draftFromFile: Intelligence assistant: draft from this file with agent
contextMenu.organizeFolder: Intelligence assistant: organize folder with agent
contextMenu.findDuplicates: Intelligence assistant: find duplicate and merge candidates with agent
contextMenu.improveFolder: Intelligence assistant: improve folder links, tags, and properties with agent
